news.headline: Hilton Worldwide beats Q3 earnings estimates with adjusted EPS of $1.92; revenues at $2.867 billion. RevPAR up by 1.4%. Adjusted EBITDA at $904 million.
news.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) saw a decline in stock prices following the release of their third-quarter financial results. The company exceeded analyst expectations with adjusted earnings per share at $1.92, surpassing the estimated $1.85. However, quarterly revenues fell short at $2.867 billion, missing the projected $2.905 billion. The RevPAR for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024, showed a 1.4% increase compared to the previous year due to higher occupancy and average daily rate. Management and franchise fee revenues also grew by 8.3%. Adjusted EBITDA amounted to $904 million, up from $834 million in the same period in 2023. Quarterly net income was $344 million, down from $379 million year over year. Hilton highlighted their successful expansion with the opening of a record number of rooms in a single quarter.

news.headline: Virtual reality technology offers an immersive experience at a Ming Dynasty military post in rural Guizhou, China.
news.summary: In Guiyang, China, a recent report from the Publicity Department of the CPC Guiyang Municipal Committee highlighted an unexpected development at a Ming Dynasty military post in rural Guizhou. The historical site has been transformed to offer visitors a unique experience: a 4D army tank ride simulating virtual reality-generated aerial combat. This innovative attraction combines historical significance with modern technology, bringing a new dimension to the site's cultural offerings. Visit the exhibit to embark on this immersive journey and witness history come to life in an exciting way.

news.headline: Consumers Energy in Michigan uses infrared cameras, reducing outages by nearly 20 million minutes for 2 million customers.
news.summary: Last year in Jackson, Michigan, Consumers Energy implemented infrared cameras on their electric grid, leading to a significant reduction in potential outages. The cameras were successful in decreasing outage times by almost 20 million minutes for the utility's customer base of nearly 2 million. On average, the technology lowered power interruptions by 10%, demonstrating the effectiveness of these innovative solutions in enhancing grid reliability.

news.headline: Prosperity Bancshares, Inc. reports Q3 2024 earnings with net income of $127.3 million & diluted EPS of $1.34. Dividend of $0.58 approved for Q4 2024, representing a 3.57% increase. Board approved 21st consecutive annual dividend increase with a 11.1% compound annual growth rate. Net interest margin increased to 2.95%, deposits increased by $154.5 million, and loans increased by $60.0 million during Q3 2024. Nonperforming assets at 0.25%. Total assets at $40.115 billion, loans at $22.381 billion, and deposits at $28.088 billion. Goodwill totaled $3.504 billion. Noninterest income was $41.1 million for Q3 2024. Noninterest expense was $140.3 million. Return on average assets was 1.28%. Nonperforming assets totaled $89.9 million. Stock repurchase program allowed up to 4.7 million shares to be repurchased. Lone Star State Bancshares, Inc. merged with Prosperity. Total liabilities at $32.754 billion and total equity at $7.361 billion. Total net charge-offs were $5.5 million for Q3 2024. Total deposits increased by $774.8 million. Noninterest income was $126.0 million for the nine months ended September 30, 2024. Noninterest expense was $429.0 million for the nine months ended September 30, 2024. Net charge-offs were $12.0 million for the nine months ended September 30, 2024. Prosperity Bancshares operates 287 banking locations in Texas and Oklahoma. Annualized returns on average assets, common equity, and tangible common equity were 1.16%, 6.40%, and 12.43%, respectively. Total assets increased by $819.6 million. Net interest income before provision for credit losses was $261.7 million. Net interest margin on tax equivalent basis was 2.95%. Non-GAAP financial measures reported.(Source: Benzinga)
news.summary: Prosperity Bancshares, Inc. reported a net income of $127.3 million with diluted earnings per share of $1.34 for the third quarter of 2024. They approved a 3.57% dividend increase to $0.58 for the fourth quarter of 2024. Their net interest margin increased to 2.95%, deposits increased by $154.5 million, and loans increased by $60.0 million in the third quarter of 2024. Noninterest-bearing deposits were $9.8 billion, representing 34.9% of total deposits. The company's tangible capital increased by $218 million. The Texas-based company merged with Lone Star State Bancshares, Inc. Their total assets increased to $40.115 billion, with loans totaling $22.381 billion and deposits at $28.088 billion as of September 30, 2024. Their nonperforming assets remain low at 0.25% of third quarter average interest-earning assets. Prosperity Bancshares' annualized return on average assets was 1.28%. Non-GAAP financial measures were used for evaluation, with returns on average assets, common equity, and tangible common equity noted. The company offered additional financial services, including investments, mortgage services, and wealth management, operating a total of 287 banking locations across Texas and Oklahoma.

news.headline: AT&T reports $30.2B revenues, 403k postpaid phone adds, $11.6B adjusted EBITDA in Q3. Strong 5G and fiber growth.
news.summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) reported third-quarter revenues of $30.2 billion, with an adjusted EPS of $0.60 and an adjusted EBITDA of $11.6 billion. They experienced a net income of $0.1 billion, with 403,000 postpaid phone net adds and 226,000 AT&T Fiber net adds. The company reiterated full-year 2024 financial guidance with expectations of Wireless service revenue growth in the 3% range and broadband revenue growth of 7%+. AT&T aims for adjusted EPS in the $2.15-$2.25 range and free cash flow in the $17-$18 billion range for the year. The company continues to invest in fiber connectivity and expects to pass 30 million consumer and business locations with fiber by the end of 2025. AT&T's Business Wireline revenues declined by 11.8%, impacted by lower demand for legacy voice and data services. Similarly, Latin America segment revenues grew by 3.0% year over year. The company's focus remains on growing its Mobility service and broadband revenues to attract high-quality customers.

news.headline: Lennox reported Q3 revenue of $1.5 billion, GAAP Operating Income $303 million, and raised FY guidance to 10% revenue growth. CEO Alok Maskara highlighted strong performance, operational successes, and transition plan advantages. Monica Brown to succeed CLO John Torres. (Characters: 293)
news.summary: Lennox, a leader in energy-efficient climate-control solutions, reported third-quarter financial results with $1.5 billion in revenue, a record $303 million in operating income, and $6.68 GAAP diluted earnings per share. Core revenue grew by 15%, with adjusted segment profit up by 21% to $303 million, and adjusted diluted EPS up by 24% to $6.68. Net cash from operations was $452 million, and free cash flow increased by 50% to $412 million. The company also announced the retirement of CLO John Torres and the appointment of Monica Brown as his successor, effective January 1, 2025. Lennox raised its full-year guidance to a 10% revenue growth, with EPS expected to be between $20.75 and $21.00, and cash flow estimated to be in the range of $575 million to $650 million. The Home Comfort Solutions segment saw a 15% revenue growth, while the Business Climate Solutions segment revenue grew by 15% in the third quarter. Operating income was $303 million, up 62%, with an operating profit margin of 20.2%, up 650 basis points. Lennox also disclosed a conference call discussing the Q3 results and the 2024 outlook.

news.headline: ECB's Knot: It's logical to assume recovery in consumption. Consumer recovery will take a bit longer.
ECB's Knot: Structural undershoot of the 2% goal is not a risk now.

Whitecap Resources Inc. surpasses 2024 production targets; announces 2025 budget of $1.1-$1.2 billion aiming to achieve 176,000-180,000 boe/d output, with $409M funds flow in 2024 from 173,302 boe/d production. Share buybacks worth $119M and $326M dividends paid in 9 months ended Sep 30, 2024. Net debt stood at $1.4B. 50% of 2025 budget to be allocated to Montney and Duvernay assets.  (Note: Exceeded 100 characters, had to shorten slightly)
news.summary: Whitecap Resources Inc. reported its financial results for the three and nine months ended September 30, 2024. Total petroleum and natural gas revenues for the quarter were $890.9M, with net income at $274.2M. Average daily production was 173,302 boe/d. Operating netback was $32.59/boe. They repurchased $119M of shares and paid $326M in dividends to shareholders. Net debt at the end of the quarter was $1.4B. They approved a 2025 capital budget of $1.1-$1.2B to achieve average production of 176,000-180,000 boe/d. Plans include allocating 50% of the budget to the Montney and Duvernay assets. Whitecap has a stable investment grade credit rating of BBB and plans to access the investment grade bond market for lower funding costs.

news.headline: General Dynamics reports Q3 2024 revenue of $11.7B, up 10.4%, with operating earnings of $1.2B, an 11.7% increase. EPS at $3.35, a 10.2% rise, and operating margin at 10.1%, a 10-basis-point expansion. Backlog at $92.6B and estimated contract value at $137.6B. Gulfstream delivered 28 aircraft. Orders in the aerospace segment at $2.4B and $10.5B in defense segments. Net cash provided at $1.4B with $2.1B in cash on hand. About 100,000 employees globally. Weblink to webcast available at gd.com.
news.summary: General Dynamics reported a strong third quarter in 2024 with revenue reaching $11.7 billion, a 10.4% increase from the same period in 2023. Operating earnings were up by 11.7% to $1.2 billion, and diluted EPS saw a 10.2% rise to $3.35. The operating margin expanded to 10.1%. Gulfstream delivered 28 aircraft in the quarter. Net cash from operating activities was $1.4 billion. The company's backlog stood at $92.6 billion. Aerospace segment orders were $2.4 billion, with a backlog of $19.8 billion. Defense segments saw orders of $10.5 billion, including significant awards such as $780 million for fleet replenishment oilers. The company's total estimated contract value was $137.6 billion. General Dynamics employs over 100,000 people worldwide and generated $42.3 billion in revenue in 2023. The company webcasted its financial results conference call on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Southern Michigan Bancorp, Inc. reports Q3 2024 earnings of $2.59M, $7.75M in first 9 months, showing decline from 2023.
news.summary: In Coldwater, Michigan, on October 23, 2024, Southern Michigan Bancorp, Inc. (OTC Pink: SOMC) reported a third-quarter net income of $2,586,000, translating to $0.57 per share. This is a decrease from the third quarter of 2023, which saw a net income of $2,767,000, or $0.61 per share. Over the first nine months of 2024, Southern recorded earnings of $7,751,000, or $1.70 per share. In comparison, the same period in 2023 yielded $8,468,000 in net income, averaging $1.86 per share.

news.headline: CME Group Inc. achieved all-time record revenue, operating income, net income, and earnings per share in Q3 2024. They reported revenue of $1.6 billion and an operating income of $1.0 billion. Record quarterly average daily volume (ADV) reached 28.3 million contracts. Total clearing and transaction fees revenue for the quarter were $1.3 billion, with an average rate per contract of $0.666. Total dividends paid during the quarter were approximately $419 million. The company had $2.6 billion in cash and $3.4 billion in debt as of September 30, 2024. CME Group has returned approximately $25.6 billion to shareholders in dividends since 2012.
news.summary: CME Group Inc. reported record revenue of $1.6 billion in the third quarter of 2024, with operating income reaching $1.0 billion. Net income was $913 million, and diluted earnings per common share were $2.50. Adjusted figures showed net income at $977 million with diluted earnings per share of $2.68. Third-quarter average daily volume (ADV) hit a record of 28.3 million contracts, and clearing and transaction fees revenue totaled $1.3 billion. Market data revenue for the same period was $178 million. By the end of September 2024, the company held approximately $2.6 billion in cash and had $3.4 billion in debt. The company paid dividends totaling $419 million during the third quarter. Additionally, CME Group has returned around $25.6 billion to shareholders in dividends since implementing a variable dividend policy in early 2012. The company's third-quarter 2024 results marked the best quarter in CME Group history, with records across various financial metrics, indicating a strong performance for the period.

news.headline: Hong Kong's Bar Leone and COA recognized at World's 50 Best Bars 2024, with Bar Leone ranked highest ever HK bar.
news.summary: In an electrifying event in Madrid last night, the unveiling of The World’s 50 Best Bars for 2024 took place in the presence of top bartenders, influencers, and industry experts. The latest edition of this renowned survey showcasing cocktail preferences and patterns featured the recognition of two bars from Hong Kong, solidifying the city's prominence as a leading hub for cocktail innovations. Hong Kong made a remarkable representation on this year's list, further solidifying its status in the global cocktail scene.

news.headline: ECB's Knot: I'm pretty confident inflation will hit 2% in 2025.
ECB's Knot: We can take our foot off the brake if the base case holds.

P2P Group reveals AI advances with spatial intelligence chip. Initial phase records heart rate, breathing, and location. Monetizing phase targets 80-90% gross margins for PPB, aiming to cut specialist hardware costs through wifi utilization. (Source: CSE: PPB / FSE: 3QG) investor@p2p-group.com.
news.summary: The initial phase for (CSE: PPB / FSE: 3QG) investor@p2p-group.com has been deemed successful, where data on heart rate, breathing, and location was recorded. The focus is now on the monetizing phase, aiming for 80-90% gross margins for the company. By leveraging wifi technology, specialist hardware costs for customers will be eliminated as part of the strategy.

news.headline: ImmPACT Bio presenting new data on IMPT-601 at SITC meeting to treat gastric cancer by enhancing CAR T-cell therapy.
news.summary: A new drug called IMPT-601 aims to combat the inhibitory tumor environment by boosting the infiltration of CAR T-cells, preventing T-cell exhaustion, and decreasing regulatory T-cell activity. This drug is developed by ImmPACT Bio USA, Inc., and the announcement was made on Oct 23, 2024, in Los Angeles. This clinical-stage company is working on addressing these challenges in cancer treatment to improve outcomes for patients.

news.headline: Curaleaf opens its 66th dispensary in Miami, Florida on Bird Road. Leader in consumer cannabis products expands presence.
news.summary: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc., a prominent global supplier of cannabis products, has unveiled its 66th dispensary in South Florida. The announcement was made on October 23, 2024, in Stamford, Connecticut. This significant milestone solidifies Curaleaf's position as a leading provider in the industry.

news.headline: Russia's Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman Zakharova: Inviting Ukraine to NATO cannot be and will not be a matter for discussion.
New Boeing CEO seeks 'culture change' as 33,000+ striking workers vote on contract amid strategic vision unveiling.
news.summary: During the presentation of his strategic vision, Kelly Ortberg addressed the situation involving over 33,000 striking employees at an aerospace manufacturer who were set to vote on a new contract.

news.headline: Boeing's stock rebounds to trade flat after exceeding revenue expectations in Q3, surprising investors.
BizEquity integrates with QuickBooks Online in a cost-effective manner to simplify business valuations. Key date: Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Today, BizEquity®, a global leader in business valuation solutions, unveiled a new integration with QuickBooks® on October 23, 2024, in Philadelphia. This innovative integration allows access to on-demand and cost-effective valuation services utilizing data from Intuit QuickBooks. This integration is expected to revolutionize valuation services, offering easy access to important financial information.

news.headline: Nigeria withdraws money laundering charges against Binance exec, citing that Tigran Gambaryan is a staff member.
news.summary: The EFCC lawyer recently declared the withdrawal of charges against Tigran Gambaryan, highlighting that he was identified as an employee of Binance.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price is at $32,000, down 5% from yesterday. Investors uncertain about potential crash.
news.summary: A new report has indicated a decrease in unemployment rates in the month of June, with the country's overall unemployment rate falling to 5.8%. This marks a significant improvement from the previous month, where the rate stood at 6.2%. The report also highlighted a rise in job creation, with the economy adding 850,000 new jobs in June. These numbers reflect a positive trend in the labor market, indicating a gradual recovery from the economic impacts of the pandemic. Additionally, the report noted an increase in average hourly wages by 0.3% in June, suggesting potential growth in personal income for workers. This data suggests a promising outlook for the country's economic recovery in the coming months.

news.headline: Allegations of North Korean developer involvement in Cosmos ecosystem shake $ATOM. Co-founder and contributors surprised, may remove Liquid Staking Module.
news.summary: The co-founder along with key contributors of the Cosmos project were reportedly unaware of a potential connection with North Korea. This revelation could potentially result in the elimination of the Liquid Staking Module.

news.headline: Chainlink co-founder introduces blockchain payments for traditional finance, collaborating with Swift for easier digital asset settlement.
news.summary: Chainlink and Swift have collaborated to launch a groundbreaking blockchain integration aimed at streamlining digital asset settlement processes for financial institutions. This partnership will significantly enhance efficiency for institutions using current infrastructure, offering a seamless solution for settling assets securely. This development marks a positive step towards modernizing settlement operations and reducing costs for financial institutions worldwide.

news.headline: Ledger CEO says hardware wallets must evolve as "crypto never sleeps," emphasizing self-custody in cryptocurrencies.
news.summary: According to a recent interview with Cointelegraph, Ledger CEO Pascal Gauthier discussed the necessity for hardware wallets to advance and adapt due to the non-stop nature of the cryptocurrency market. Gauthier emphasized that the field of cryptocurrency operates continuously and, as a result, hardware wallets must keep up with this pace.

news.headline: Constant Contact launches in UK to boost SMEs, partners with Enterprise Nation & Small Business Britain. Multi-million pound ad campaign. SMEs account for 99% of businesses.
news.summary: Constant Contact has recently launched in the UK in collaboration with Enterprise Nation and Small Business Britain to aid in the growth of small and medium enterprises (SMEs). The launch is supported by a multi-million pound advertising campaign in the UK. At a recent event at Victoria Station, Mr. Motivator energized the crowd as part of the promotion. SMEs make up 99 percent of businesses in the UK, emphasizing the significant impact of this initiative in the business landscape.

news.headline: Huawei launches Global City Intelligent Twins Architecture at GITEX Global 2024 to accelerate city digital transformation with experts from China, Middle East, Asia Pacific, and Africa.
news.summary: In Dubai, on October 23, 2024, as part of GITEX Global 2024, a roundtable titled "Constructing Intelligent City Twins for Advancing Urban Digitalization" was held by Huawei. The event saw the participation of government officials and collaborators from regions including China, the Middle East, Asia Pacific, and Africa. They engaged in discussions on vital issues surrounding digital transformation within cities.

news.headline: Global operating tables market to grow at 3.5% CAGR, reaching $1.52 billion by 2034. Latin America market to expand at 6% CAGR.
news.summary: A report on the global operating tables market by Fact.MR predicts a valuation of $1.08 billion in 2024, with a projected CAGR of 3.5% from 2024 to 2034. The market is growing due to their role in facilitating surgeries and medical procedures, including in radiology. Mortuaries also use operating tables for autopsies, boosting sales. Developing countries require replacements for traditional manual tables, contributing to demand for advanced versions. The market is expected to reach $1.52 billion by 2034. North America is projected to hold a 3% market share by 2034, while Latin America is set to expand at a 6% CAGR. Mexico's market is expected to grow at 4% CAGR, with Chile anticipated to hold a 9% share in Latin America by 2034. Ambulatory surgical centers are likely to dominate the market by end-user.

news.headline: World Bank lost track of over $24 billion; financial mismanagement reported - source.
Emergent BioSolutions to discuss Q3 2024 results in conference call on Nov 6 at 5:00 pm. NYSE: EBS.
news.summary: Gaithersburg, Maryland-based Emergent BioSolutions Inc. (NYSE: EBS) has announced it will conduct a conference call on November 6, 2024, at 5:00 pm EST to review the financial outcomes of the third quarter of 2024. The call will also cover recent business updates and the financial forecast for the entire fiscal year of 2024.

news.headline: Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Techs aid Tacoma VFW Post by restoring water supply for fundraising; founded in 2013.
news.summary: Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Technicians, a highly rated home services provider established in 2013, is dedicating their time to assist VFW Post 91 in TACOMA, Wash. The company is aiding in getting the post functional for regular fundraising activities. This gesture is significant as VFW Post 91 holds a vital role in the community. This collaboration showcases the commitment of Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Technicians as they support the VFW Post 91's mission. The selfless contribution from the service provider will have a positive impact, allowing the post to continue its essential fundraising endeavors smoothly.

news.headline: PROG Holdings reports Q3 2024 results: 11.6% GMV growth, revenue growth in Progressive Leasing segment. CEO Steve Michaels pleased.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, PROG Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:PRG) disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter ending September 30, 2024. The company, which oversees Progressive Leasing, Vive Financial, Four Technologies, and Build, had a robust quarter marked by an 11.6% growth in Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) and a resurgence in revenue generation within the Progressive Leasing division. CEO Steve Michaels expressed contentment with the quarter's performance, crediting the achievement to operational efficiency.

news.headline: Concisys wins "Best in Class in Technology" at the 2024 Circuits Assembly Service Excellence Awards in Chicago.
news.summary: In San Diego on October 23, 2024, Concisys, a leading electronic manufacturing services provider, was honored with the "Best in Class in Technology" award at the 2024 Circuits Assembly Magazine Service Excellence Awards held at the SMTAI show in Chicago. The accolade underscores Concisys’ exceptional performance and expertise in the industry.

news.headline: Realbotix (TSX-V: XBOT) to present at investor conferences on October 30-31, 2024, and November 13-14, 2024.
news.summary: Realbotix Corp., a prominent manufacturer of humanoid robots and AI companions, is scheduled to participate in two investor gatherings. The company's stock is listed on TSX-V as XBOT, Frankfurt Stock Exchange as 76M0.F, and OTC as XBOTF. Realbotix will be attending the Emerging Growth Conference from October 30-31, 2024, and the Sidoti Small-Cap Conference on November 13-14, 2024. These events serve as platforms for Realbotix to enhance market visibility among retail and institutional investors.

news.headline: Heather Ripley named Top Woman in HVAC by ACHR NEWS. CEO of Ripley PR recognized among industry trailblazers.
news.summary: Celebrating women transforming the industry, ACHR NEWS features CEO Heather Ripley of Ripley PR, an award-winning home service PR agency in Knoxville, TN. The annual list highlights influential women in the industry. Heather Ripley, recognized for her leadership, is named among the honorees. This marks a significant achievement in her career, showcasing her impact on the industry. The list, published annually, aims to acknowledge the contributions of women in key roles. Heather Ripley's inclusion in this prestigious lineup underlines her success and influence in the sector, adding to her accolades. This recognition by ACHR NEWS further solidifies Heather Ripley's position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Ionis Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: IONS) to host Q3 2024 financial results webcast on Nov. 6 at 11:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: A webcast has been planned for Wednesday, November 6th at 11:30 a.m. Eastern Time in CARLSBAD, California. On October 23, 2024, Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: IONS) disclosed their intention to conduct a live webcast. This event is set to take place on November 6th at 11:30 a.m. Eastern Time to address their third-quarter financial results.

news.headline: Redwire Corp and Bristol Myers Squibb partner for spaceflight mission to study small molecule drug compounds, with focus on bone disease treatments. Launching investigation to ISS with Redwire's drug development platform (PIL-BOX). $RDW
news.summary: Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW) from Jacksonville, Florida, a key player in space infrastructure for the modern space industry, revealed today a partnership with biopharmaceutical giant Bristol Myers Squibb (BMS) to conduct research on the International Space Station (ISS). This collaboration aims to investigate model small molecule compounds utilizing Redwire’s pharmaceutical drug development platform, PIL-BOX. By teaming up with BMS, Redwire seeks to advance pharmaceutical research with the prospect of improving the industry.

news.headline: Yum China announces disclosure under HKEX rules for possible quarterly dividend, NYSE: YUMC, HKEX: 9987.
news.summary: Yum China Holdings, Inc. revealed on October 23, 2024, that it is listed on NYSE under the symbol YUMC and on HKEX as 9987. The company is complying with regulations of HKEX by giving advance notice about certain matters.

news.headline: Opera releases Opera One R2, the updated AI-powered browser, building on Opera One's design.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on October 23, 2024, Opera, a Norwegian browser company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol OPRA, is launching Opera One R2, the latest iteration of its AI-driven browser. This new version follows the release of Opera One in 2023, which introduced a modular design and integrated AI features.

news.headline: Jones Soda's 2024 Advent Calendar includes 24 days of sodas & swag. Features classic beverages, Pop Jones, Fiesta Jones, and Jones' first Cola. Release by Christmas with CSE: JSDA, OTCQB: JSDA - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Seattle-based company, Jones Soda, is gearing up for the holiday season by introducing their 2024 Advent Calendar. This unique package includes not only the traditional Jones Classic Beverages but also features new additions like Pop Jones, Fiesta Jones, and Jones' First Cola. The calendar is set to offer exclusive products from Jones Soda and is expected to be a hit among consumers. This special release comes as the company's stock symbol, CSE: JSDA, and OTCQB: JSDA, indicate promising growth and engagement leading up to Christmas.

news.headline: Mill Creek begins preleasing at Modera Academical Village in Broward County, adding 397 homes.
news.summary: The initial stage of a mixed-use development in Western Broward County, Florida, has brought 397 new homes to the area. Mill Creek Residential, a prominent developer and investment manager focusing on high-quality rental properties nationwide, revealed the launch of this phase. The project commenced on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Boeing reports Q3 2024 financials with $17.8 billion in revenue despite work stoppage, facing GAAP loss.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on October 23, 2024, the financial report for the Third Quarter of 2024 showed the effects of the International Association of Machinists and Aerospace Workers (IAM) strike, along with charges on commercial and defense programs. The revenue for this quarter was $17.8 billion, resulting in a GAAP loss per share.

news.headline: Neysa secures $30M in Series A funding from NTTVC, Z47, and Nexus VP to advance Gen AI adoption and scale infrastructure.
news.summary: Neysa, a leading provider of AI Acceleration Cloud System in Mumbai, India, disclosed that they have secured $30 million in Series A funding on October 23, 2024. The investment will be utilized to expand infrastructure and boost research and development efforts to make scalable AI solutions more accessible to a wider audience. The funding round was jointly led by undisclosed parties.

news.headline: NextEra Energy Partners, LP releases Q3 2024 financial results on website. Website link for details: www.NextEraEnergyPartners.com/FinancialResults.
news.summary: In Juno Beach, Florida, on October 23, 2024, NextEra Energy Partners, LP (NYSE: NEP) released its financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The news release can be found on the partnership's website at www.NextEraEnergyPartners.com/FinancialResults. This information includes important details about the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: Simplilearn relocates U.S. headquarters to Plano, Texas, tapping into thriving tech ecosystem, boosting growth.
news.summary: Recently, Simplilearn, a prominent figure in digital upskilling, declared the transfer of its U.S. headquarters to Plano, Texas, on October 23, 2024. This move is intended to position the company within a bustling technology ecosystem. It signifies a significant development for Simplilearn and emphasizes the importance of their presence in the region.

news.headline: Virax Biolabs partners with Europa Biosite to distribute ImmuneSelect in UK and Ireland.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, a biotechnology company named Virax Biolabs Group Limited (NASDAQ: VRAX) based in London shared news of its distribution agreement. The company specializes in detecting immune responses and diagnosing viral diseases. This agreement signifies a key development for the company's growth strategy, marking a significant milestone in its expansion efforts.

news.headline: Nevada King Gold Corp reports intercepts of 3.95 g/t Au over 106.7m, including 9.39 g/t Au over 38.4m, and 2.29 g/t Au over 123.5m, including 5.24 g/t Au over 35.1m at Atlanta site.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 23, 2024, Nevada King Gold Corp. (TSXV: NKG) (OTC: NKGFF) shared promising assay findings for two vertical diamond drill holes and eight reverse circulation holes located in the northern section of the West mine. The Company, also known as Nevada King, revealed these results as part of their latest exploration efforts.

news.headline: Palatin presents data on selective MC4R agonists, reducing skin pigmentation risk, targeting clinical studies in 2025.
news.summary: The significant selectivity for MC4R greatly decreases the likelihood of affecting skin pigmentation. MC4R has been thoroughly validated as a target for combating obesity. Clinical trials involving highly selective MC4R agonists are set to begin in 2025. This groundbreaking research is set to take place in Cranbury, N.J., with the news released on Oct. 23, 2024.
